caption: A man is seated in a studio setting, wearing a white button-down shirt with tan suspenders, a bow tie, and a distinctive tall, grey, textured wig. He wears over-ear headphones and sits behind a professional microphone. The background consists of a wall decorated with framed photographs and clothing items, including a "LEE" branded garment. On-screen graphics appear on both sides of the man; on the left is a logo that says "STALID" and "PODCAST," and on the right is text that reads "SS TALK JOY." Throughout the sequence, the man remains in the same position, facing slightly to the left. He is speaking, and his mouth opens and closes as he talks. The camera remains static, capturing the subtle movements of his facial expressions and speech while the surrounding studio equipment and background elements stay still.
